rewrite.rewritten: Qatar has announced the launch of a new event, with the Ministry of Culture and Sports highlighting that it is expected to attract a significant number of visitors. The Ministry affirmed that the event will feature a distinguished line-up, marking it as one of the major highlights of the year.
changes_summary: Replaced 'huge new event' with 'new event' and added attribution to the Ministry of Culture and Sports.
Replaced 'Lots of people are expected' with 'expected to attract a significant number of visitors' and added attribution.
Replaced 'one of the biggest things this year' with 'one of the major highlights of the year' and added attribution.
Removed 'You won't believe how cool the line-up is' and replaced with 'feature a distinguished line-up'.
added_attributions: the Ministry of Culture and Sports (highlighting)

rewrite.rewritten: Qatar Living announced the launch of a new platform aimed at transforming the online shopping experience in Qatar. The platform is designed to offer a unique experience for consumers across the country.
changes_summary: Removed casual and hype language ('SUPER excited', 'game-changing', 'revolutionize', 'mind-blowing', 'must-see').
Replaced first-person plural with entity-first sentence ('Qatar Living announced').
Toned down claims to be factual and measured ('aimed at transforming', 'designed to offer').
